bug.description: HARQ process error such as incorrect retransmission or wrong redundancy version

prompt:
There is a HARQ process error such as incorrect retransmission or wrong redundancy version downstream of function init_nr_bler_table in the openair2/NR_UE_PHY_INTERFACE subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/NR_UE_PHY_INTERFACE/NR_Packet_Drop.c:210.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
